diagrams.title: Member Binary Operator Function Call
diagrams.description: Shows how obj1 + obj2 translates to member function call
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how member operators are invoked and parameter passing

diagrams.title: Member vs Friend Operator Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of member and friend operator syntax
elements: Friend: friend Class operator+(const Class&, const Class&) - 2 params
diagrams.purpose: Choosing between member and friend based on requirements

diagrams.title: Operator Chaining with References
diagrams.description: Shows how (a + b) + c works with reference return
elements: Result used as left operand for + c
diagrams.purpose: Understanding importance of returning references for chaining
